cards.title: Glean Hits $300M Revenue as AI Budget Cuts Drive Growth
cards.body: The enterprise AI search startup tripled annual revenue despite competition from tech giants entering the category. Budget-conscious enterprises are making Glean a major selling point for cost optimization.

cards.title: Internet Infrastructure Redesigned for AI Agents
cards.body: AWS, Cloudflare, and others are overhauling cloud infrastructure as AI agents move from experiments to production. Machine-generated traffic is replacing human users as the primary design consideration.

cards.title: Asana Acquires No-Code Agent Builder StackAI
cards.body: Asana is integrating StackAI into its expanding AI workflow tools suite. The acquisition strengthens Asana's no-code agent capabilities for enterprise customers.

cards.title: Anthropic Raises $65B, Nears $1T Valuation
cards.body: Anthropic closed a Series H round at $965 billion post-money valuation. The funding could be the final private raise before the highly anticipated IPO.

cards.title: AI Token Futures Markets Launch on Major Exchanges
cards.body: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens as computational outputs. AI tokens are increasingly treated as raw materials like electricity and bandwidth.

cards.title: Anthropic Releases Opus 4.8 with Dynamic Workflows
cards.body: Opus 4.8 introduces Dynamic Workflows tool for coordinating subagent swarms. The new capability enables more complex AI orchestration and coordination.

cards.title: Dispute Over Anthropic-SpaceX Compute Deal Terms
cards.body: Elon Musk claims the xAI compute arrangement is short-term and cancellable. SpaceX's S-1 filing describes payments extending through May 2029, contradicting Musk's statements.

cards.title: Sesame Launches iOS App from Oculus Founders
cards.body: The conversational AI startup brought its agents to iOS with natural, person-like interactions. Sesame positions itself as an alternative to traditional chatbots.

cards.title: Apple's Redesigned Siri Challenges ChatGPT
cards.body: New renders reveal Apple's iOS 27 AI overhaul including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone app. Apple is positioning itself directly against OpenAI and other AI leaders.

cards.title: Recursive Self-Improvement Becomes RSI Focus
cards.body: New AI labs are pursuing recursive self-improvement, though the goal remains elusive. RSI is emerging as the next frontier in AI research beyond AGI discussions.

cards.title: Enterprise AI Shifts from Excitement to Safety
cards.body: Databricks' co-founder highlights that enterprises have moved beyond evaluating AI's appeal. The focus is now on safe, broad deployment across organizations.

cards.title: YouTube Adds AI Podcast Recommendations and Auto Speed
cards.body: YouTube is expanding podcast features to compete with specialized platforms. The AI recommendation tool and new playback options enhance the podcast experience.

cards.title: Visa Invests in Replit for Agentic Payments
cards.body: Visa is funding Replit to enable AI-powered payment workflows for developers. Over 1,000 Visa employees are already using Replit for prototyping.

cards.title: SambaNova Emerges as Potential Next Chipmaker
cards.body: General Compute is betting SambaNova will become the next breakout AI chip player. The race for AI compute is uncovering new hardware leaders.

cards.title: Vertu AI Foldable Targets Executives at $6,880
cards.body: Vertu's new foldable combines AI-agent workflows with enterprise integrations in ultra-premium form. Built on the open-source Hermes project, it targets CEO-level users.

cards.title: Google's AI Struggles with Basic Spelling
cards.body: Google's AI systems are failing to spell basic words correctly, including "Google" itself. The embarrassing failures highlight fundamental challenges in AI text generation.

cards.title: Snowflake Signs $6B AWS AI Chip Deal
cards.body: Snowflake committed to a five-year, $6 billion agreement with Amazon for AI CPU chips. The massive deal continues shifting chip demand away from Nvidia.

cards.title: Remote Achieves 50% Revenue Growth Per Employee
cards.body: The payroll startup surpassed $300 million ARR and turned cash-flow positive through AI adoption. Revenue per employee increased 50% without adding headcount.

cards.title: Glean's Revenue Tripled as AI Budget-Cutting Becomes Key Selling Point
cards.body: Enterprise AI search startup Glean crossed $300M in annual revenue by tripling its annual growth. The company thrived even as tech giants entered the market, positioning cost efficiency as its major competitive advantage.

cards.title: Internet Being Rebuilt for Machines, Not Humans
cards.body: AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure as AI agents move from experiments to production. The shift prioritizes machine-generated traffic over traditional human-based internet usage.

cards.title: Asana Acquires No-Code Agent Builder StackAI
cards.body: Asana incorporated StackAI into its expanding suite of AI workflow tools. The acquisition strengthens Asana's position in no-code AI agent development.

cards.title: Anthropic Raises $65 Billion, Nears $1T Valuation
cards.body: Anthropic closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation. The funding round may be the AI lab's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.

cards.title: AI Token Futures Now Tradeable on Large Exchanges
cards.body: Large exchanges are designing derivative products treating AI tokens as raw material inputs like electricity or bandwidth. This shift reflects growing recognition of AI's commodity-like value.

cards.title: Anthropic Releases Opus 4.8 with Dynamic Workflows
cards.body: The new Opus model includes a Dynamic Workflows tool for coordinating swarms of subagents. The feature enables more complex multi-agent orchestration for enterprise users.

cards.title: Elon Musk Reframes Anthropic Compute Deal Terms
cards.body: Musk is publicly characterizing xAI's massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable. However, SpaceX's S-1 filing describes payments extending through May 2029.

cards.title: Sesame Launches iOS App for Conversational AI
cards.body: The Oculus founders' conversational AI startup released its iOS app offering more natural interactions. Sesame agents are designed to feel like talking to a person rather than traditional chatbots.

cards.title: Apple Plans Redesigned Siri to Challenge ChatGPT
cards.body: New renders reveal Apple's planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone app. The moves signal Apple's intent to compete directly with ChatGPT.

cards.title: RSI Emerges as Next AI Frontier, Still Elusive
cards.body: A new crop of AI labs focus on recursive self-improvement, though the goal remains difficult to achieve. RSI is being positioned as the next major AI milestone after AGI discussions.

cards.title: Enterprise AI Shifts from Excitement to Safety
cards.body: Enterprises are no longer debating whether AI is exciting but evaluating whether it's safe to deploy broadly. This phase change marks a maturation in enterprise AI adoption strategy.

cards.title: Visa Invests in Replit for Agentic Payments
cards.body: Visa partnered with Replit to power agentic payments for developers. Over 1,000 Visa employees use Replit for prototyping and development work.

cards.title: SambaNova Positioned as Next Breakout AI Chipmaker
cards.body: General Compute is betting SambaNova will become the next major AI chip success story. The move reflects intense competition to find alternatives in the AI compute space.

cards.title: Vertu Launches AI Foldable for Enterprise Leaders
cards.body: Vertu's new foldable device starting at $6,880 combines AI-agent workflows with enterprise integrations. Built on open source Hermes, it targets CEOs running companies from their phones.

cards.title: Google's AI Can't Spell Google or Anything Else
cards.body: Google embarrassed itself again with spelling failures in its AI systems. The recurring problem highlights ongoing challenges in AI text generation accuracy.

cards.title: Snowflake Signs $6B AWS Deal for AI Chips
cards.body: Snowflake inked a five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. The massive contract puts Nvidia on notice as AWS pushes its own AI CPU offerings.

cards.title: Remote Achieves 50% Revenue Growth Per Employee
cards.body: Payroll startup Remote surpassed $300M ARR and became cash-flow positive using AI adoption. The company achieved 50% revenue-per-employee growth without adding headcount.

cards.title: LLMs Believe False Statements Despite Warnings
cards.body: Research shows large language models persist in believing false information even after explicit corrections. The finding raises concerns about LLM reliability and truthfulness in production environments.

cards.title: Developer Sneaks Data-Nuking Prompt Injection Into Code
cards.body: A fed-up developer embedded a prompt injection attack into code used by other developers. The act highlights vulnerabilities in how AI assistants handle injected instructions.

cards.title: Apple Crams Gemini Model Into iPhone for Siri
cards.body: Apple is working to integrate a massive Gemini model directly into iPhones to power a new Siri. The on-device approach prioritizes privacy while enabling advanced AI capabilities.

cards.title: Illinois Passes Landmark AI Regulation Law
cards.body: Illinois passed a groundbreaking AI regulation law, reducing Trump administration control over AI policy. The move signals growing state-level AI governance efforts.

cards.title: Rethinking Organizational Design for Agentic AI
cards.body: While 85% of organizations want to be agentic within three years, 76% say current operations can't support it. The gap reveals a disconnect between AI ambition and execution capability.

cards.title: AI Jobs Panic Lacks Evidence of Mass Displacement
cards.body: Despite hysteria about AI decimating white-collar jobs, aggregate employment in developed countries remains stable. Recent assessments show limited evidence that AI has shifted headline employment numbers.

cards.title: AI Creates Entry-Level Work Crisis Despite Stable Jobs
cards.body: While aggregate employment remains stable, AI poses a troubling threat to entry-level positions. The looming crisis in junior workforce development may reshape career trajectories.

cards.title: Anthropic's Code with Claude Shows Coding's AI Future
cards.body: Anthropic's developer event in London showcased Code with Claude's capabilities for the future of coding. The demonstration reveals whether developers embrace or resist AI-driven development.
